title: biscutella maritima
intro: Biscutella maritima, also known as Cornish or Rock Biscuit, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Biscutella maritima include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
